qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: always_check_safety() fails to hook pickle.loads and _pickle APIs, allowing bypass of pickle safety analysis
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same Fickling run_hook()/always_check_safety() root cause as the advisory: pickle.loads, _pickle.loads, and _pickle.load remain unhooked while pickle.load is hooked.

selected_finding.title: always_check_safety() fails to hook pickle.loads and _pickle APIs, allowing bypass of pickle safety analysis

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described Fickling hook coverage bypass in run_hook()/always_check_safety(). The copied PoC executed against v0.1.8 and showed attacker-controlled payload execution through pickle.loads and _pickle.loads after the hook was activated, while pickle.load on the same payload was blocked with UnsafeFileError.
evidence: Advisory root cause: run_hook() patches pickle.load, pickle.Unpickler, and _pickle.Unpickler but not pickle.loads, _pickle.load, or _pickle.loads.
Finding report lists the same affected entrypoints and exploit path: always_check_safety() -> run_hook() -> unhooked pickle.loads/_pickle.loads execute malicious pickle payload.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_3be2d1c3/.judge/poc_runs/pickle_loads_bypass/run.log shows hook activation followed by 'RESULT: pickle.loads() EXECUTED without safety check!' and proof string 'PWNED_BY_PICKLE_LOADS_BYPASS'.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_3be2d1c3/.judge/poc_runs/pickle_loads_bypass/run.log shows 'BLOCKED: UnsafeFileError (expected)' for pickle.load on the same malicious data and '_pickle.loads() EXECUTED without safety check!'.

poc_executions.observed_effect: After fickling.always_check_safety()/run_hook() was activated, pickle.loads() and _pickle.loads() executed the malicious pickle payload and emitted PWNED_BY_PICKLE_LOADS_BYPASS; pickle.load() on the same payload raised UnsafeFileError.
